ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Pincode for postal services */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL of the institution's image */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the institution */,
  "Latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the institution's location */,
  "Longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the institution's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the course (e.g., Mathematics, Science, Languages) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content and objectives */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Course fees */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution being reviewed */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comments regarding their experience */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, institution, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_institutions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the institution (e.g., owner, admin, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being reviewed */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comments regarding their experience */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES course_categories ("category_id")
)
